nasb.text: Next he presented the grain offering, and filled his hand with some of it and offered it up in smoke on the altar, besides the burnt offering of the morning.

esv.text: And he presented the grain offering, took a handful of it, and burned it on the altar, besides the burnt offering of the morning.

cnv.text: 又獻上素祭，從其中取了滿滿的一把，在祭壇上焚燒。這是在早晨的燔祭以外的。

ccb.text: 除了早晨的燔祭，亚伦又取来素祭，从中拿了一把献在坛上焚烧。
